summary: Classified the hydrated cluster without mutations. #53961 remains the canonical delivery-status tracking PR, while #57755 and #57843 are related active delivery follow-ups, and #70589/#62440 are an independent local JSON stdout subcluster. No close, label, merge, or fix actions are safe from this dedupe-only job because the open PRs are active, useful, draft or failing checks, and several have unresolved bot-review or maintainer-sequencing signals.
